```text
489	export function transposeNotes(score: EditableScore, noteIds: Set<string>, semitones: number): EditableScore {
490	  const next = cloneScore(score);
491	  for (const part of next.parts) {
492	    for (let mi = 0; mi < part.measures.length; mi++) {
493	      const measure = part.measures[mi];
494	      for (let ni = 0; ni < measure.notes.length; ni++) {
495	        const note = measure.notes[ni];
496	        if (!noteIds.has(note.id)) continue;
497	        if (note.isRest) {
498	          const octave = neighborOctaveForRepitch(part, mi, ni);
499	          const defaultPitch = `B${octave}`;
500	          note.isRest = false;
501	          note.pitch = midiToPitch(pitchToMidi(defaultPitch) + semitones);
502	          delete note.articulations;
503	          delete note.dynamics;
504	          delete note.tie;
505	          delete note.originalGeneratedPitch;
506	          continue;
507	        }
508	        const midi = pitchToMidi(note.pitch);
509	        note.pitch = midiToPitch(midi + semitones);
510	      }
511	    }
512	  }
513	  return next;
514	}
515	
516	/** Add articulation to notes by ID */
517	export function addArticulation(score: EditableScore, noteIds: Set<string>, articulation: string): EditableScore {
518	  const next = cloneScore(score);
519	  for (const part of next.parts) {
520	    for (const measure of part.measures) {
521	      for (const note of measure.notes) {
522	        if (noteIds.has(note.id)) {
523	          const arts = note.articulations ?? [];
524	          if (!arts.includes(articulation)) arts.push(articulation);
525	          note.articulations = arts;
526	        }
527	      }
528	    }
529	  }
530	  return next;
531	}
532	
533	/** Set dynamics on notes by ID */
534	export function setNoteDynamics(score: EditableScore, noteIds: Set<string>, dynamics: string): EditableScore {
535	  const next = cloneScore(score);
536	  for (const part of next.parts) {
537	    for (const measure of part.measures) {
538	      for (const note of measure.notes) {
539	        if (noteIds.has(note.id)) {
540	          note.dynamics = dynamics;
541	        }
542	      }
543	    }
544	  }
545	  return next;
546	}
547	
548	/** Insert empty measure before index */
```

```text
271	export function extractStaffLabelLayout(
272	  container: HTMLElement,
273	  partCount: number,
274	): StaffLabelLayout[] {
275	  if (partCount <= 0) return [];
276	
277	  const svg =
278	    container.querySelector<SVGSVGElement>("svg.riff-ScoreCanvas__svg") ??
279	    container.querySelector<SVGSVGElement>(".riff-ScoreCanvas svg") ??
280	    container.querySelector<SVGSVGElement>("svg");
281	
282	  if (!svg) return [];
283	
284	  const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
285	  const staffGroups = svg.querySelectorAll("g.staff");
286	  const n = Math.min(partCount, staffGroups.length);
287	  const out: StaffLabelLayout[] = [];
288	
289	  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
290	    const g = staffGroups[i];
291	    if (!g) continue;
292	    const rect = g.getBoundingClientRect();
293	    if (rect.height < 4) continue;
294	    out.push({
295	      top: rect.top - containerRect.top,
296	      height: rect.height,
297	    });
298	  }
299	
300	  return out;
301	}
302	
303	/**
304	 * Elements inside RiffScore that can scroll (vertical score panes, horizontal canvas).
305	 * Overlays use `getBoundingClientRect` against the HF wrapper; listeners on these
306	 * nodes keep positions in sync when ResizeObserver does not run (e.g. wheel / trackpad).
307	 */
308	export function getRiffScoreScrollRoots(container: HTMLElement): HTMLElement[] {
309	  const roots: HTMLElement[] = [];
310	  const content = container.querySelector<HTMLElement>(".riff-ScoreEditor__content");
311	  if (content) roots.push(content);
312	  const canvas = container.querySelector<HTMLElement>(".riff-ScoreCanvas");
313	  if (canvas && canvas !== content) roots.push(canvas);
314	  return roots;
315	}
316	
317	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
318	// Helpers
319	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
320	
321	/** Find note selection data by noteId within an EditableScore. */
322	function findNoteSelection(
323	  score: EditableScore,
324	  noteId: string,
325	): NotePosition["selection"] | null {
326	  for (const part of score.parts) {
327	    for (let mi = 0; mi < part.measures.length; mi++) {
328	      for (let ni = 0; ni < part.measures[mi].notes.length; ni++) {
329	        if (part.measures[mi].notes[ni].id === noteId) {
330	          return { partId: part.id, measureIndex: mi, noteIndex: ni, noteId };
```

```text
183	  const toggleSelectedRests = () => {
184	    if (!score || !hasSelection) return;

192	          else if (!note.pitch.match(/^[A-G](#|b)?\d+$/)) note.pitch = "C4";

195	    }
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-23 00:47:30Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./frontend/src/lib/music/scoreUtils.ts`

```text
16	function midiToPitch(midi: number): string {
17	  const oct = Math.floor(midi / 12);
18	  const pc = ((midi % 12) + 12) % 12;
19	  const steps = ["C", "C#", "D", "D#", "E", "F", "F#", "G", "G#", "A", "A#", "B"];
20	  return `${steps[pc]}${oct}`;
21	}
22	
23	const STEP_SEMITONES: Record<string, number> = { C: 0, D: 2, E: 4, F: 5, G: 7, A: 9, B: 11 };
24	
25	const DURATION_BEATS: Record<DurationType, number> = {
26	  w: 4,
27	  h: 2,
28	  q: 1,
29	  "8": 0.5,
30	  "16": 0.25,
31	  "32": 0.125,
32	};
33	
34	function pitchToMidi(pitch: string): number {
35	  const m = pitch.match(/^([A-G])(#|b)?(\d+)$/);
36	  if (!m) return 60;
37	  const step = m[1] ?? "C";
38	  const octNum = parseInt(m[3] ?? "4", 10);
39	  let semitones = (STEP_SEMITONES[step] ?? 0) + (octNum - 4) * 12;
40	  if (m[2] === "#") semitones += 1;
41	  if (m[2] === "b") semitones -= 1;
42	  return 60 + semitones;
43	}
44	
45	/** Deep clone EditableScore */
46	export function cloneScore(score: EditableScore): EditableScore {
47	  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(score));
48	}
49	
50	export function noteBeats(note: Note): number {
51	  const base = DURATION_BEATS[note.duration] ?? 1;
52	  if (!note.dots) return base;
53	  let factor = 1;
54	  let add = 0.5;
55	  for (let i = 0; i < note.dots; i++) {
56	    factor += add;
57	    add /= 2;
58	  }
59	  return base * factor;
60	}
61	
62	export function parseMeasureBeats(timeSignature?: string): number {
63	  if (!timeSignature) return 4;
64	  const m = timeSignature.match(/^(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)$/);
65	  if (!m) return 4;
66	  const num = Number.parseInt(m[1] ?? "4", 10);
67	  const den = Number.parseInt(m[2] ?? "4", 10);
68	  if (!Number.isFinite(num) || !Number.isFinite(den) || den <= 0) return 4;
69	  return (num * 4) / den;
70	}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
447	  // Extract note positions after renders for overlay positioning
448	  useEffect(() => {
449	    if (!isReady || !containerRef.current || !score) return;
450	
451	    let scrollRaf = 0;
452	    const updatePositions = () => {
453	      if (!containerRef.current) return;
454	      const positions = extractNotePositions(containerRef.current, score, getRsToHf());
455	      setNotePositions(positions);
456	      const layouts = extractStaffLabelLayout(containerRef.current, score.parts.length);
457	      const overlayOk =
458	        layouts.length === score.parts.length &&
459	        layouts.every((l) => l.height >= 4);
460	      setStaffLabelsUseOverlay(overlayOk);
461	      setStaffLabelLayouts(overlayOk ? layouts : []);
462	    };
463	
464	    const scheduleFromScroll = () => {
465	      if (scrollRaf) return;
466	      scrollRaf = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
467	        scrollRaf = 0;
468	        updatePositions();
469	      });
470	    };
471	
472	    // Wait for RiffScore to render
473	    const timer = setTimeout(updatePositions, 200);
474	
475	    // Re-extract on resize
476	    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
477	      setTimeout(updatePositions, 100);
478	    });
479	    resizeObserver.observe(containerRef.current);
480	
481	    const scrollRoots = getRiffScoreScrollRoots(containerRef.current);
482	    for (const el of scrollRoots) {
483	      el.addEventListener("scroll", scheduleFromScroll, { passive: true });
484	    }
485	
486	    return () => {
487	      clearTimeout(timer);
488	      resizeObserver.disconnect();
489	      for (const el of scrollRoots) {
490	        el.removeEventListener("scroll", scheduleFromScroll);
491	      }
492	    };
493	  }, [isReady, score, getRsToHf, showNoteNameLabels]);
494	
495	  useLayoutEffect(() => {
496	    if (!showNoteNameLabels || presentation) {
497	      setLearnerClipTopPx(0);
498	      return;
499	    }
500	    const root = containerRef.current;
501	    if (!root) return;
502	
503	    const measure = () => {
504	      const tb = root.querySelector(".riff-Toolbar");
505	      if (!tb) {
506	        setLearnerClipTopPx(0);
507	        return;
508	      }
509	      const cr = root.getBoundingClientRect();
510	      const br = tb.getBoundingClientRect();
511	      setLearnerClipTopPx(Math.max(0, Math.round(br.bottom - cr.top)));
512	    };
513	
514	    measure();
515	    const ro = new ResizeObserver(measure);
516	    ro.observe(root);
517	    const tbEl = root.querySelector(".riff-Toolbar");
518	    if (tbEl) ro.observe(tbEl);
519	    return () => ro.disconnect();
520	  }, [showNoteNameLabels, presentation, isReady, instanceId, score]);
521	
522	  useEffect(() => {
523	    if (!noteInputPitchLabelEnabled || !isReady || !score) {
524	      setInputPreviewLabel(null);
525	      return;
526	    }
```

Found the root cause. There's an octave numbering mismatch between `pitchToMidi` and `midiToPitch` in `scoreUtils.ts`. Let me trace through it and verify before proposing the fix.

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-23 00:49:32Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-23 00:49:46Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-23 00:49:55Z)**_

I've identified both bugs. They share a single root cause.

**Root cause:** `midiToPitch` in `scoreUtils.ts` has an off-by-one error in the octave computation. `pitchToMidi` correctly uses C4 = MIDI 60 (scientific pitch standard), but `midiToPitch` uses `Math.floor(midi / 12)` which produces octave numbers 1 too high. Round-trip breakdown:

- `pitchToMidi("C4")` → 60
- `midiToPitch(60)` → `Math.floor(60/12) = 5` → `"C5"` (wrong — should be `"C4"`)

**Consequence for ↓ (down arrow) from C4:**
- MIDI 60 − 1 = 59
- `midiToPitch(59)` → `Math.floor(59/12) = 4`, pc=11 → `"B4"`
- But B4 is **above** C4 in pitch — so the note visually moves **up**, not down.

**Consequence for the label:** A 13-semitone phantom jump on each keypress forces VexFlow to dramatically re-layout the staff (ledger lines, canvas expansion), shifting the `g.staff` bounding rect that the label anchors to.

**Fix:** `Math.floor(midi / 12) - 1` corrects the octave alignment.

Verification:
- `midiToPitch(60)` → oct=5−1=4, pc=0 → `"C4"` ✓
- `midiToPitch(59)` → oct=4−1=3, pc=11 → `"B3"` ✓ (one below C4)
- `midiToPitch(61)` → oct=5−1=4, pc=1 → `"C#4"` ✓

No other code paths need changing — all callers do a `pitchToMidi → offset → midiToPitch` round trip; the fix makes the round-trip internally consistent.

---

**Shall I proceed with the implementation as described above? (Yes / No / Request changes)**
